title: Iran reviewing deal, no communication for days — Baghaei: 'no negotiations on nuclear details at this stage'
snippet: Iranian media confirms Iran is reviewing the proposed agreement but spokesman Esmail Baghaei clarifies: 'no negotiations on nuclear details at this stage.' No communication from Iran for days. Updates the Khamenei non-response picture: Iran is internally reviewing the MoU but has explicitly ruled out nuclear negotiations for now, despite Rubio's 30-60-90 day timeline.
tag_reason: 업데이트 — src-1524 (카메네이 무응답)의 후속. 이란이 합의안을 검토 중이지만 핵 세부사항 협상은 거부. '무응답'에서 '검토 중이나 핵 논의 불가' 상태로 진전
